title: monster
description: A simple plugin for customizing and enhancing vanilla mobs
body:
![Core Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/Core%20Support-Spigot-blue)
![Version Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version%20Support-1.9.x--1.21.x-blue)
![Paid](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paid-No-blue)
![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fricedoc.handyplus.cn%2Fversion.json&query=%24.monster&prefix=v&label=Latest%20Version)

### 1. Introduction

> monster —— A simple plugin for customizing and enhancing vanilla mobs

1. Customize equipment types and wearing probabilities for vanilla mobs
2. Customize drop rates of equipment worn by mobs
3. Customize applicable worlds
4. Customize number of random enchantments on equipment
5. Toggle whether spawners are affected
6. Customize level-up probability for mobs in combat
7. Customize HP and damage increase per level
8. Toggle plugin functionality
9. Customize message texts
10. Only affects naturally spawned mobs (excluding special spawns)

### 2. Screenshots

![monster](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/plugin/MonsterPlus/readme.webp)

### 3. Commands & Permissions

**Permission**: handy.monster (OPs have by default)

| Command               | Function                |
|-----------------------|-------------------------|
| /monster reload       | Reload configuration    |
| /monster on           | Enable mob enhancement  |
| /monster off          | Disable mob enhancement |
| /monster on [seconds] | Enable for X seconds    |
